PROJECT.NAME: wjOphPuer
PROJECT.TITLE: Ophryotrocha puerilis, genomic and transcriptomic data.
PROJECT.DESCRIPTION: This project collects the genomic and transcriptomic data generated for Ophryotrocha puerilis to facilitate genome assembly and annotation as part of the Biodiversity Genomics Europe project (BGE, https://biodiversitygenomics.eu/) and organised by the European Reference Genome Atlas (ERGA, https://www.erga-biodiversity.eu/) initiative.

PROJECT.NAME: wjOphPuer20
PROJECT.TITLE: Ophryotrocha puerilis, genome assembly, wjOphPuer20.
PROJECT.DESCRIPTION: This project provides the genome assembly of Ophryotrocha puerilis. The assembly is provided by the European Reference Genome Atlas (ERGA, https://www.erga-biodiversity.eu/) via the Biodiversity Genomics Europe project (BGE, https://biodiversitygenomics.eu/).

PROJECT.NAME: ilEumAren
PROJECT.TITLE: Eumannia arenbergeri, genomic and transcriptomic data.
PROJECT.DESCRIPTION: This project collects the genomic and transcriptomic data generated for Eumannia arenbergeri to facilitate genome assembly and annotation as part of the Biodiversity Genomics Europe project (BGE, https://biodiversitygenomics.eu/) and organised by the European Reference Genome Atlas (ERGA, https://www.erga-biodiversity.eu/) initiative.

PROJECT.NAME: ilEumAren11
PROJECT.TITLE: Eumannia arenbergeri, genome assembly, ilEumAren11.
PROJECT.DESCRIPTION: This project provides the genome assembly of Eumannia arenbergeri. The assembly is provided by the European Reference Genome Atlas (ERGA, https://www.erga-biodiversity.eu/) via the Biodiversity Genomics Europe project (BGE, https://biodiversitygenomics.eu/).

PROJECT.NAME: iqTroOvul
PROJECT.TITLE: Troglophilus ovuliformis, genomic and transcriptomic data.
PROJECT.DESCRIPTION: This project collects the genomic and transcriptomic data generated for Troglophilus ovuliformis to facilitate genome assembly and annotation as part of the Biodiversity Genomics Europe project (BGE, https://biodiversitygenomics.eu/) and organised by the European Reference Genome Atlas (ERGA, https://www.erga-biodiversity.eu/) initiative.

PROJECT.NAME: iqTroOvul1
PROJECT.TITLE: Troglophilus ovuliformis, genome assembly, iqTroOvul1.
PROJECT.DESCRIPTION: This project provides the genome assembly of Troglophilus ovuliformis. The assembly is provided by the European Reference Genome Atlas (ERGA, https://www.erga-biodiversity.eu/) via the Biodiversity Genomics Europe project (BGE, https://biodiversitygenomics.eu/).
